channel.title: LLM Timeline — Google Models
channel.description: Large Language Model releases from Google.

item.title: Gemini 2.5 Computer Use (Google)
item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by Google

item.title: TimesFM-ICF (Google)
item.description: Parameters: TimesFM-ICF License: closed Type: model TimesFM-ICF is 6.8% more accurate than TimesFM (Base). Time-series forecasting only. 'a large pretraining corpus of 100B real world time-points' may be more than 100B tokens.

item.title: Gemini 2.5 Flash Image (Nano Banana) (Google)
item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by Google

item.title: imagen 4 fast (Google)
item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by Google

item.description: Parameters: 800M License: open Type: model AI model by Google

item.title: TimesFM (Google)
item.description: Parameters: TimesFM License: open Type: model Time-series forecasting only. 'a large pretraining corpus of 100B real world time-points' may be more than 100B tokens.

item.title: Chirp (Google)
item.description: Parameters: 2B License: closed Type: model AI model by Google

item.title: AudioPaLM (Google)
item.description: Parameters: AudioPaLM License: closed Type: model a unified multimodal architecture that can process and generate text and speech with applications including speech recognition and speech-to-speech translation

item.title: PaLM 2 (Google)
item.description: Parameters: 340B License: closed Type: model AI model by Google

item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by Google

item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by Google

item.title: PaLM-2 Gecko (Google)
item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by Google

item.title: PaLM-2 Otter (Google)
item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by Google

item.title: PaLM 2 (Google)
item.description: Parameters: PaLM 2 License: open Type: model “What we found in our work is that it’s not really the sort of size of model — that the larger is not always better,” Deepmind VP Zoubin Ghahramani said in a press briefing ahead of today’s announcement. “That’s why we’ve provided a family of models of different sizes. We think that actually parameter count is not really a useful way of thinking about the capabilities of models and capabilities are really to be judged by people using the models and finding out whether they’re useful in the tests that they try to achieve with these models.”

item.title: CoLT5 (Google)
item.description: Parameters: CoLT5 License: closed Type: model up to 64k context window [48k words or about 96 pages -Alan]

item.title: ViT-22B (Google)
item.description: Parameters: 21.7B License: closed Type: model AI model by Google

item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by Google

item.title: Meena (Google)
item.description: Parameters: Meena License: closed Type: model Dialogue model. Trained 61B tokens for 164x epochs to 10T tokens!

item.title: T5-3B (Google)
item.description: Parameters: 2.8B License: open Type: model AI model by Google

item.title: T5-11B (Google)
item.description: Parameters: 11B License: open Type: model AI model by Google

item.title: M4-50B (Google)
item.description: Parameters: 50B License: closed Type: model AI model by Google

item.title: T5 (Google)
item.description: Parameters: T5 License: open Type: model "Text-to-Text Transfer Transformer". C4 + NLP language problems. "compared the following three configurations: First, the standard baseline model, which was pre-trained on 235 ≈ 34B tokens; second, the baseline trained instead for about 1 trillion tokens (i.e. the same amount of pre-training used for T5), which we refer to as “baseline-1T”; and third, T5-Base."

item.title: VQ-VAE-2 (ImageNet) (Google)
item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by Google

item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by Google

item.description: Parameters: 5.2M License: open Type: model AI model by Google

item.description: Parameters: 4.9M License: open Type: model AI model by Google

item.description: Parameters: 7.8M License: open Type: model AI model by Google

item.title: GPipe (Transformer) (Google)
item.description: Parameters: 6B License: closed Type: model AI model by Google

item.title: BERT-Large (Google)
item.description: Parameters: 340M License: open Type: model AI model by Google

item.title: BERT (Google)
item.description: Parameters: BERT License: open Type: model "BERT — 128 000 tokens per step × 1 000 000 steps → 128 B tokens processed"

item.title: DeepLabV3+ (Google)
item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by Google

item.title: DeepLabV3 (Google)
item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by Google

item.title: Transformer (big) (Google)
item.description: Parameters: Transformer (big) License: open Type: model "Transformer Big — 32 768 tokens per step × 300 000 steps → 9.83 B tokens processed" "We trained on the standard WMT 2014 English-German dataset consisting of about 4.5 million sentence pairs... For English-French, we used the significantly larger WMT 2014 English-French dataset consisting of 36M sentences and split tokens into a 32000 word-piece vocabulary. Sentence pairs were batched together by approximate sequence length. Each training batch contained a set of sentence pairs containing approximately 25000 source tokens and 25000 target tokens."

item.title: Transformer (base) (Google)
item.description: Parameters: Transformer (base) License: open Type: model "Transformer Base — 32 768 tokens per step × 100 000 steps → 3.28 B tokens processed" "We trained on the standard WMT 2014 English-German dataset consisting of about 4.5 million sentence pairs... For English-French, we used the significantly larger WMT 2014 English-French dataset consisting of 36M sentences and split tokens into a 32000 word-piece vocabulary. Sentence pairs were batched together by approximate sequence length. Each training batch contained a set of sentence pairs containing approximately 25000 source tokens and 25000 target tokens."
